import json, io, sys, os, re, unicodedata, difflib, itertools, math

path_hadith="/mnt/data/file-GKgoPWB6fR896BnuZfjrBZ-six_hadith_books.json"
path_quran="/mnt/data/file-RhatJL6W5hpishQfBLfQ2a-quranic_verses.json"
with open(path_hadith, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    had = json.load(f)
with open(path_quran, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    qv = json.load(f)
len(had), len(qv)

orig_full = "لا تَزُدوا في الصلاة، وَلا تُقَصِّروا، وَلا تَقُوموا عَلَيها حَتّى تُكْمِلوا"
def normalize(s):
    # remove diacritics
    s = re.sub(r'[ًٌٍَُِّْـٰ]', '', s)
    # remove punctuation and non-arabic letters/digits/space
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', s)
    # unify alef forms
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ى','ي').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ة','ه')
    # collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s
norm_full = normalize(orig_full)
norm_full

# Try search by some key tokens
tokens = normalize("لا تزدوا الصلاة لا تقصروا لا تقوموا حتى تكملوا").split()
tokens

def token_set_ratio(a,b):
    sa=set(a.split()); sb=set(b.split())
    inter=len(sa&sb); return inter/(len(sa)|0.0001)
cands=[]
for i,rec in enumerate(had):
    txt=get_text(rec)
    if not txt: continue
    n=normalize(txt)
    score=token_set_ratio(' '.join(set(tokens)), n)
    if score>0.6:
        cands.append((score,i,txt))
len(cands)
